query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry by kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality

3.description: get 200-year flood zones intersecting Kristiansand municipality

4.description: get parcels intersecting both storm-surge and flood zones

5.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teig
